# Pull Request

## Description

<!-- Clear description of changes -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Refactoring

## Related Issues

Fixes #(issue number)

## Testing

<!-- How was this tested? -->

- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Integration tests added/updated
- [ ] Manual testing completed
- [ ] Tested on multiple OS (if relevant)

## Documentation

- [ ] README updated (if needed)
- [ ] Documentation files updated (if needed)
- [ ] Code comments added (if needed)
- [ ] API documentation updated (if needed)

## Checklist

- [ ] Commits follow conventional commits format
- [ ] Code follows project style guidelines
- [ ] All tests pass (`cargo test --workspace`)
- [ ] No Clippy warnings (`cargo clippy`)
- [ ] Code is formatted (`cargo fmt`)
- [ ] No new unsafe code (or documented why)
- [ ] Breaking changes are documented

## Performance Impact

- [ ] No impact
- [ ] Improves performance
- [ ] May impact performance (explain below)

<!-- If performance impact, provide benchmarks or before/after -->

## Security Considerations

- [ ] No security implications
- [ ] Reviewed for security concerns

<!-- If any security concerns, explain -->

## Screenshots / Demo

<!-- Add screenshots or demo links if applicable (e.g., desktop UI changes) -->

## Additional Notes

<!-- Any additional context or notes -->

---

**Note:** Please ensure CI/CD checks pass before requesting review.
